text: Apple reported Q3 2026 earnings of $1.78 per share, beating consensus of $1.65. Revenue rose 8% year-over-year to $89.5B, driven by iPhone strength.
Apple raised full-year 2026 guidance, now expecting revenue growth of 9-11% versus prior guidance of 5-7%. Management cited resilient demand in Services and Wearables.
notes: Guidance raise authored by management — dual aspect.

text: Microsoft announced today that it has agreed to acquire cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in cash. The deal is expected to close in calendar Q4 2026 subject to regulatory approval.
notes: M&A announcement with explicit regulatory contingency.

text: The Federal Reserve held the benchmark federal funds rate at 4.25-4.50% on Wednesday. Chair Powell signaled the FOMC remains data-dependent on the path of inflation.
Nvidia unveiled its next-generation Blackwell Ultra GPU at GTC 2026. The chip delivers 2.5x the inference throughput of Hopper at the same power envelope, with shipments beginning Q1 2027.
Tesla's chief financial officer Vaibhav Taneja announced his resignation effective end of quarter. The board has begun a search for a permanent replacement; an interim CFO has been named.
Meta Platforms filed its annual report on Form 10-K with the SEC, disclosing $3.4B in legal contingencies related to ongoing antitrust litigation in the EU.
Alphabet beat Q2 earnings expectations with EPS of $1.95 vs $1.82 consensus but lowered full-year cloud-revenue guidance citing slower enterprise spend.
notes: Earnings beat paired with guidance cut — dual aspect.

text: Just loaded up on $AMD calls. Earnings next week and the AI tailwind is undeniable. This is going to $250.
notes: Community retail post anchored on earnings.

text: Severe thunderstorms are expected across the Midwest this weekend, with potential for hail and tornadoes in eastern Kansas.
